assignments.name: Assign_Asset_Name_Input_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Asset Name Input To Variable

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assemblies_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assemblies To Link

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assets_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assets To Link

assignments.description: Reset values from datatable selections and buttons to the state that they were in when the flow started running.
assignments.name: Reset_Flow_Values
assignments.label: Reset Flow Values

decisions.description: Check to avoid adding duplicate assemblies to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
decisions.label: Is Assembly Already In Update List?

rules.name: Yes_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
rules.label: Yes - Assembly Already In Update List

decisions.description: Avoid the possibility of adding duplicate assets to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Asset_Already_In_Update_List
decisions.label: Is Asset Already In Update List?

rules.name: Yes_Asset_Already_In_Update_List
rules.label: Yes - Asset Already In Update List

decisions.description: Choose path to take based on the button clicked on the Asset / Assembly Selection Screen
decisions.name: Link_Selected_Records
decisions.label: Link Selected Records?

Flow.description:
Tickets
Screen flow gets launched from Ticket lightning page and gives user options to attach a Deal, Account, Project, Contact. Users can also multi-attach Assets or Assemblies

formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Asset_Name_Assembly_Type__c FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Asset_Name_Assembly_Type__c FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c WHERE leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c = '" & {!Serial_Number} & "'" )

formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%'" )

Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Ticket Relationship Console

fields.name: SelectedRecordsDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Records To Link To Ticket


Assets: {!Create_Asset_Name_Collection}


Assemblies: {!Create_Assembly_Name_Collection}

fields.name: SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: Records Successfully Linked To Ticket

subflows.name: Update_Assets_and_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket
subflows.label: Update Assets and Assemblies Fields On Ticket
